strengths: Demonstrated systematic approach to peg-to-peg transfers
Maintained reasonable instrument coordination during most phases
Successfully completed multiple transfer sequences before encountering difficulties
weaknesses: Lost two objects out of view during the task execution
Struggled with object recovery after drops
Completion time of 240 seconds indicates inefficient movement patterns

drills.name: Lost-object recovery awareness
drills.description: Practice slow-motion transfer sets emphasizing stable release and regrasp angle to prevent drops
drills.targets_weakness: Lost two objects out of view during the task execution

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Perform 15 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on controlled handoffs
drills.targets_weakness: Struggled with object recovery after drops

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Complete the task phase slowly with minimal wasted regrasping and deliberate instrument positioning
drills.targets_weakness: Completion time of 240 seconds indicates inefficient movement patterns

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your systematic approach into more reliable object control to prevent drops. Work on anticipating and preventing object loss rather than recovering from it.
